ralplan_architect_review.summary: Architect approved Option A: private Zorid Markdown facade plus centralized syntax-range collector, with hardening for static-gate scope, export compatibility, parser-order fixtures, and collector tests using the private language support.

ralplan_critic_review.summary: Critic approved principle-option consistency, fair alternatives, risk mitigation clarity, testable acceptance criteria, verification steps, no-regex gate, custom syntax via Lezer, performance/no-worse plan, user boundaries, and application of Architect improvements.

recommended_follow_up.fallback: $ralph only if explicitly selected for single-owner persistent verification

implementation_stop_condition: Final implementation has no live-preview regex parser paths, preserves existing previews, includes checkbox bug fixture, represents custom syntax via Lezer, passes lint/typecheck/tests, and has performance/no-worse evidence.
